accessibility-component.introducedBlock:
def RealityKitComponent "Accessibility"
{
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.Accessibility"
    bool isEnabled = 0
    string label = ""
    string value = ""
}
accessibility-component.sparseExamples:
# AccessibilityElement.usda
def RealityKitComponent "Accessibility"
{
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.Accessibility"
    bool isEnabled = 1
    string label = "Custom Label"
    string value = "This component makes my entity accessible "
}

# Label.usda
def RealityKitComponent "Accessibility"
{
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.Accessibility"
    string label = "Some Label"
}

fields.name: value
fields.variants: "This component makes my entity accessible ", "Some Value"

fields.name: MixGroup.gain
fields.notes: Authored on child RealityKitAudioMixGroup prims after a mix group exists.

fields.name: MixGroup.mute
fields.notes: Authored on child RealityKitAudioMixGroup prims after a mix group exists.

fields.name: MixGroup.speed
fields.notes: Authored on child RealityKitAudioMixGroup prims after a mix group exists.

fields.name: AudioFile.file
fields.notes: Authored on external RealityKitAudioFile prims, not on the component prim.

fields.name: AudioFile.mixGroup
fields.notes: Routes external audio-file prims to a specific mix-group child prim.

matrix.note: Inspector launcher only; no mix groups or routed files authored yet
Adds first RealityKitAudioMixGroup child with default gain, mute, and speed
Creates one external RealityKitAudioFile prim and routes it to MixGroup
Two external audio files can route to the same mix group
Adds a second mix-group child and routes one audio file to each group
Group-level gain changes on the child mix-group prim, not on the component prim
Mute is a group-level child-prim field
Speed is a group-level child-prim field

grounding-shadow-component.sparseExamples:
# All.usda
def RealityKitComponent "GroundingShadow"
{
    bool enableIBLShadow = 1
    bool enableMeshShadow = 1
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.GroundingShadow"
}

# Casts Shadow.usda
def RealityKitComponent "GroundingShadow"
{
    bool enableIBLShadow = 1
    bool enableMeshShadow = 1
    bool enableReceiveIBLShadow = 0
    bool enableReceiveMeshShadow = 0
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.GroundingShadow"
}

image-based-light-component.sparseExamples:
# Environment Resource.usda
def RealityKitComponent "ImageBasedLight"
{
    asset ibl = @../RenderCrate-HDRI_Orbital_40_4K.hdr@
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.ImageBasedLight"
    bool isGlobalIBL = 0
}

# Inherits Rotation.usda
def RealityKitComponent "ImageBasedLight"
{
    bool enableRotation = 1
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.ImageBasedLight"
    bool isGlobalIBL = 0
}

physics-motion-component.sparseExamples:
# ALL.usda
def RealityKitComponent "MotionState"
{
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.MotionState"
    float3 m_userSetAngularVelocity = (1, 1, 1)
    uint m_userSetAngularVelocityVersion = 1
    float3 m_userSetLinearVelocity = (1, 1, 1)
    uint m_userSetLinearVelocityVersion = 1
}

# Angular Velocity.usda
def RealityKitComponent "MotionState"
{
    uniform token info:id = "RealityKit.MotionState"
    float3 m_userSetAngularVelocity = (1, 1, 1)
    uint m_userSetAngularVelocityVersion = 1
}
